# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in graphql-sentinel itself, please report it responsibly:

1. **Do not** open a public issue
2. Email the maintainer or use [GitHub's private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/mstuart/graphql-sentinel/security/advisories/new)
3. Include steps to reproduce and potential impact

We will acknowledge receipt within 48 hours and aim to release a fix within 7 days for critical issues.

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 1.0.x   | Yes       |
